ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "poll_name" TEXT /* Name of the poll */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the poll is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was last updated */,
  "poll_type" TEXT /* Type of the poll (e.g., advance, regular) */,
  "poll_status" TEXT /* Status of the poll (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the party (e.g., liberal, conservative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll where the result was obtained */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate associated with the result */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes obtained by the candidate */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of votes obtained by the candidate */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the candidate in the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electors" (
  "elector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elector */,
  "elector_name" TEXT /* Name of the elector */,
  "elector_type" TEXT /* Type of the elector (e.g., voter, delegate) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the elector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_elector_map" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "elector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the elector */,
  "voting_status" TEXT /* Voting status of the elector in the poll (e.g., voted, not voted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id", "elector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rejected_ballots" (
  "rejected_ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rejected ballot */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll where the ballot was rejected */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rejection reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rejected_ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rejected_ballots_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_votes" (
  "total_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total vote record */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the poll */,
  "turnout_percentage" TEXT /* Voter turnout percentage in the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_votes_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_history" (
  "poll_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll history entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the poll (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_history_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)
